sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71250" key="nuktou=ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτ-οῦρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n71250.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νυκτοφύλαξ</ref></xr>, name of the planet <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Saturn,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">941c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
